What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A black kettle-style charcoal grill sits with its lid open, revealing a metal grate divided into two zones. Aluminum foil covers the left side of the grate while glowing red charcoal briquettes heat the right side. An orange rectangular tray attaches to the grill side, holding a white paper plate with raw meat patties and hamburger buns waiting nearby.

question: Describe what is happening?
canonical_answer: Three raw reddish-brown hamburger patties rest on a white disposable plate placed atop an orange plastic tray. Two light brown buns sit near the plate on the same tray. Beneath the metal grill grate, grey charcoal briquettes glow with orange embers on the right side while aluminum foil covers the left side.

question: Describe the progression of visible items and grill configuration from the start to the end of the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the grill lid opens revealing glowing coals on the right; at 6s, an orange tray appears attached to the side holding buns; at 12s, seasoning becomes visible on the three raw patties; at 14s, only two patties remain on the white plate near the grill.

question: Detail the specific arrangement of the cooking surface and ingredients observed during the recording.
canonical_answer: At 3s, aluminum foil covers the left grate side while coals glow on the right; at 7s, the black kettle grill stands on asphalt with lid open; at 13s, pinkish-red meat patties sit on a white plate; at 19s, glowing briquettes shine beneath parallel metal rods.
